hero.headline: Your vacation.
hero.subtitle: Handpicked apartments curated with care, dedicated assistance and local insights to experience Gargano as those who lives it do.
hero.tagline: We manage vacation homes and apartments in the heart of the Gargano.

what_we_do.headline: Vacation homes and apartments on the

pillar1.title: Managing apartments and vacation homes
pillar1.body: We select and manage apartments and vacation homes, so every stay is simple, well cared for and enjoyable.

sub1.title: Before
sub1.body: We prepare every detail of your arrival, before your stay even begins.

sub2.title: During
sub2.body: Real support and presence throughout your stay, from arrival to departure.

sub3.title: After
sub3.body: We make sure everything went well, stay available, and look forward to welcoming you back, whenever you're ready to return.

about.headline: Not just an apartment.
about.headlineBold: A starting point to discover the Gargano.
about.body: Cosmia was born from a love for the Gargano and a desire to share it. Apartments, 360° support, and a list of places that you won't find in any guide.
about.imageAlt: Arched window overlooking the Gargano coastline

apartments.headline: Our apartments are the beginning of your Gargano experience.
apartments.subtitle: Every apartment has its own character. Find the one that's right for you.

experiences.headline: Gargano has a character all its own.
experiences.subtitle: Forest and sea ten minutes apart. Sea caves you can swim into. White villages rich in history overlooking the sea. And in spring and autumn, all of this with a different face but just as pleasant.

sea.title: The Sea
sea.description: Cala di Porto Greco, Cala della Pergola, coves reachable on foot or by boat, with water that's genuinely clear. The Sentiero dell'Amore trail takes you straight to the shore.

hikes.title: Hiking
hikes.description: Trails through the Foresta Umbra among ancient beeches, the Abbazia di Pulsano hidden in the rocks, sunsets on the promontory that stay with you. You'll understand quickly why people come back every year.

villages.title: Villages
villages.description: Mattinata, Vieste, Peschici, Manfredonia: places where time actually slows down.

food.title: Gastronomy
food.description: Extra virgin olive oil, fresh mozzarella, catch of the day caught that morning. You eat well, you live well.

faq.headline: Answers to the most common questions,
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about arrival, amenities and booking. For anything else, get in touch.

cta.headline: Every stay begins with a conversation.
cta.subtitle: Questions, availability, bookings, information — we'll respond within a few hours.

whatsapp.message: Hi! I'd like information about the Cosmia Hospitality apartments on the Gargano.

not_found.subtitle: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved. Let's get you back on track.

about_page.headline: A passion for Gargano.
about_page.section1Body: Cosmia started from a simple idea: Gargano is beautiful. Really beautiful. And people who come here deserve to actually live it, not just scroll past it from a generic apartment. Summer, spring, autumn — every season brings something different and is worth the trip. The houses are in Mattinata: sun, sea, good food, and the whole Gargano reachable in minutes.
about_page.section2Body: We know where to have the best breakfast in Mattinata. We know the cove worth the early alarm, the best trail at sunset, and the no-sign trattoria that's worth the trip. Not because we read it somewhere — because we've been there, and we keep going back. When you arrive, ask us everything.

care.title: Your arrival
care.description: Every apartment is ready when you arrive. Fresh linen, fully equipped kitchen, everything in place. You only have to think about your stay.

authenticity.title: The Gargano you won't find online
authenticity.description: The places not in any guide, the flavours not on TripAdvisor. We're here to share them.

presence.title: Always reachable
presence.description: A message, a call — we're there.
